completed_tasks.name: Database migration for QR token fields

remaining_tasks.name: Email library functions for status notifications
React Email components for status emails
Update admin orders API for QR flow

decisions.decision: Use Option 3+4 hybrid: Smart notifications + QR pickup
decisions.rationale: Customer wants email on status changes AND QR code for pickup verification
Requested by user, with ability to reissue if customer deletes email

decisions.decision: Auto-redirect to scan page after completion
decisions.rationale: Enables rapid order processing for next customer

decisions.decision: Show only name/details (no photo) on scan page

decisions.rationale: Security requirement - tokens must be cryptographically random

next_action: Install qrcode package and add email library functions (sendOrderReadyEmail, sendOrderStatusUpdateEmail, generateQRToken)
context_notes: Database migration is complete. Prisma schema now has qrToken and qrTokenExpiresAt fields. Migration has been applied to PostgreSQL database. Ready to implement email functions and QR generation. The design uses a hybrid approach: email notifications on status changes (READY, CANCELLED, REFUNDED) plus QR code in READY email for pickup verification. Admin scans QR with phone browser to mark orders complete.
